text: Last class you said one task was still pending.
Today you ask a colleague to help you finish it.

Could you help me with this report?
Could you send me the file, please?
Would you mind helping me with this report?
Would you mind sending me the file?
Hi Tom, can I ask you a quick favor? My battery is low. Could you lend me your charger?
Sure, no problem. Here you go. Do you need anything else?
Actually, yes. My workload is heavy today. Would you mind covering the afternoon meeting for me?
Not at all. I have a spare hour in the afternoon. Could you send me the agenda?
Of course. I will send it now. Thank you so much, Tom. Can I grab you a coffee?
That would be great. We make a good team. Just let me know if you need anything else.
Can I ask you a quick favor?
Could you lend me your charger, please?
Would you mind covering the call for me?
Sure, no problem. Not at all.
Thank you so much. Can I grab you a coffee?

Hi Aline, this is Tom. I have a small favor to ask. My workload is really heavy this morning, and I am very busy. Could you cover the ten o'clock client call for me? It is a short call, just a quick check-in. And would you mind double-checking the budget file before I send it? I want to be sure the numbers are correct. If you have a spare minute, that would help me a lot. Thank you so much. I will grab you a coffee, and I will help you with your tasks later this week. Let me know if you can. Talk soon.

This is a quick note to myself before the busy morning starts. First, my battery is low, so I need to borrow a charger from Tom. Then I have to ask him a favor: would he mind covering my afternoon meeting, because my workload is heavy today. After that, I want to ask Maria to double-check the report before the team meeting. I know everyone is busy, so I will be polite and use could you and would you mind. To thank them, I will grab them a coffee and help with their tasks later. I feel ready to ask for help.

First, Aline notices that her battery is low, so she asks Tom to lend her a charger. Then she explains that her workload is heavy this morning. After that, she asks Tom to cover her afternoon meeting. Next, she asks him to double-check the budget file before he sends it. Finally, she thanks Tom and offers to grab him a coffee.
